title: AnvilColorizer
description: Allows players to use color codes in an anvil.
body:
_中国用户可以前往[此处](https://www.minebbs.com/resources/anvilcolorizer-1-12-x-1-20-x.8245/)查看介绍_

### Plugin Description
- Allows players to use color codes when renaming items in an anvil, and that's it.
- Compatible with both vanilla (&e) color codes and HEX (#ffffff) colors.

### Permissions List
- **anvilcolorizer.use** - Allows the use of vanilla color codes.
- **anvilcolorizer.use.hex** - Allows the use of 16-bit colors.

### Formatting Guide
- Vanilla color: “&ftext”
- 16-bit color: “#fffffftext”
